header.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the station?
header.confirmDeleteDesc: After deletion, the station will be marked as 'inactive' and will no longer be visible on the map or in search results
header.confirmDeleteLocation: Are you sure you want to delete this location?
header.confirmDeleteLocationDesc: This action cannot be undone. The location and its data will be permanently removed.

statusTooltip.pending: The station is under construction or being prepared for activation
statusTooltip.inactive: The station has been disabled indefinitely or decommissioned

cells.noRats: No cells yet. Select a radio technology above to add cells.
cells.pendingReadOnly: Cells cannot be modified while this station has pending status. Change the status to published to edit cells.
cells.noStationCells: No cells found for this station
cells.noCells: No cells yet. Click "Add Cell" to add one.

inactiveBanner.title: Inactive station
inactiveBanner.description: Not visible on the map. Pending deletion from the database

pendingBanner.title: Pending station
pendingBanner.description: Publicly visible without cells. Change the status to published to edit cells
